name: Stuffed Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Eggplant, cut in half lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out the eggplant flesh, leaving about 1/2 inch of the shells intact.
2. Cut the remaining flesh into 1-inch cubes and sauté in margarine with beef, flour, chopped green pepper, onion, salt, and pepper until browned, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat and stir in milk.
4. Fill the eggplant shells with the mixture and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
5. Place the stuffed shells in a 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes or until the eggplant shells are tender.
